Package com.dtwthalion.mpgo

Class NumpressCodec

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.mpgo.NumpressCodec
public final class NumpressCodec extends Object
Numpress-delta codec for near-lossless compression of spectral data.

Encoding: quantizes double values to int64 via a fixed-point scale factor, then stores first-differences (deltas). The delta representation is highly compressible by zlib/LZ4.

Relative error is well under 1 ppm for typical MS m/z data (100-2000 Da) due to the 62-bit precision headroom.

API status: Stable.

Cross-language equivalents:
  • Objective-C: MPGONumpress
  • Python: mpeg_o._numpress
Since:
0.6

  • Method Details

    • scaleForRange

      public static long scaleForRange(double minValue, double maxValue)
      Compute the fixed-point scale factor for a value range. Matches ObjC +[MPGONumpress scaleForValueRangeMin:max:] and Python mpeg_o._numpress.scale_for_range.
      Parameters:
      minValue - minimum value in the range
      maxValue - maximum value in the range
      Returns:
      scale factor (always >= 1)

    • computeScale

      public static long computeScale(double[] values)
      Convenience — compute scale from a data array. Delegates to scaleForRange(double, double) using the array's absolute maximum as both bounds.
      Parameters:
      values - the data array
      Returns:
      scale factor (always >= 1)

    • linearEncode

      public static long[] linearEncode(double[] values, long scale)
      Encode double values to int64 deltas with the given scale factor.

      First element is absolute quantized value; subsequent elements are first-differences. Uses IEEE-754 ties-to-even rounding.

      Parameters:
      values - input data
      scale - fixed-point scale from computeScale(double[])
      Returns:
      int64 delta array (same length as input)

    • linearDecode

      public static double[] linearDecode(long[] deltas, long scale)
      Decode int64 deltas back to double values.
      Parameters:
      deltas - int64 delta array from linearEncode(double[], long)
      scale - the same scale factor used for encoding
      Returns:
      reconstructed double array

    • encode

      public static NumpressCodec.EncodedResult encode(double[] values)
      Convenience: encode in one step, returning scale + deltas.
